subcodes.first_line: O wanderer from thy homeland! Thy letter was received and its contents noted. From the intensity of thy distress, thou art sorrow-stricken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آواره اوطان مکتوب شما واصل و مضمون معلوم شد که از شدت پریشانی محزون هستید
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @business; financial; property matters, @consolation and comfort, @poems and quotation from poetry
